requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for Zimbabwe PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量——津巴布韦光伏逆变器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——辛巴威光伏逆變器IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據

summary.en: PV inverters are switching power-electronic equipment, so Zimbabwe project files should include EMC and power-quality evidence mapped to IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 series tests, including conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, harmonic current emissions, flicker where applicable, and installation assumptions such as cable lengths, filters, earthing, surge protection, and battery coupling. The applicable evidence should be aligned with SAZ-recognised standards evidence, ZERA grid/distribution-code expectations, ZETDC connection conditions, and project-owner requirements.
summary.zh: 光伏逆变器属于开关型电力电子设备，因此津巴布韦项目文件应包含映射至IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列测试的EMC和电能质量证据，包括传导和辐射发射、抗扰度、谐波电流排放、适用时的闪烁，以及电缆长度、滤波器、接地、浪涌保护和电池耦合等安装假设。适用证据应与SAZ认可标准证据、ZERA电网/配电规范预期、ZETDC接入条件及项目业主要求保持一致。
summary.zht: 光伏逆變器屬於開關型電力電子設備，因此辛巴威項目文件應包含映射至IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列測試的EMC和電能品質證據，包括傳導和輻射發射、抗擾度、諧波電流排放、適用時的閃爍，以及電纜長度、濾波器、接地、浪湧保護和電池耦合等安裝假設。適用證據應與SAZ認可標準證據、ZERA電網/配電規範預期、ZETDC接入條件及項目業主要求保持一致。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, harmonics, flicker, immunity, and power-quality tests where applicable
SAZ standards evidence and ZERA Grid Code / Distribution Code requirements where applicable

summary.en: China EMC files may include GB/T 37408-2021 EMC clauses, GB 17625 series harmonic limits, GB/T 17626 series immunity tests, GB/T or GB adoptions of IEC/CISPR methods, CNAS reports, and CQC/CGC certificate annexes. These reports can support technical comparison but should be checked against the exact IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 edition, laboratory acceptability, and Zimbabwe project route.
summary.zh: 中国EMC文件可能包括GB/T 37408-2021中的EMC条款、GB 17625系列谐波限值、GB/T 17626系列抗扰度测试、GB/T或GB采标IEC/CISPR方法、CNAS报告以及CQC/CGC证书附件。这些报告可支持技术对照，但应按确切IEC 62920 / IEC 61000版次、实验室可接受性和津巴布韦项目路径进行核查。
summary.zht: 中國EMC文件可能包括GB/T 37408-2021中的EMC條款、GB 17625系列諧波限值、GB/T 17626系列抗擾度測試、GB/T或GB採標IEC/CISPR方法、CNAS報告以及CQC/CGC證書附件。這些報告可支持技術對照，但應按確切IEC 62920 / IEC 61000版次、實驗室可接受性和辛巴威項目路徑進行核查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
GB 17625 series — harmonic-current and voltage-fluctuation limits

gap.en: Gap: China EMC reports do not automatically demonstrate IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 acceptance for Zimbabwe. Exporters should map emissions, harmonics, flicker, immunity, surge, earthing, filter configuration, cable assumptions, and battery-coupled operating modes to the exact inverter configuration submitted to SAZ, ZERA, ZETDC, the project owner, insurer, or lender.
gap.zh: 差距：中国EMC报告不会自动证明津巴布韦接受IEC 62920 / IEC 61000。出口商应将发射、谐波、闪烁、抗扰度、浪涌、接地、滤波器配置、电缆假设及电池耦合运行模式映射到提交给SAZ、ZERA、ZETDC、项目业主、保险方或融资方的准确逆变器配置。
gap.zht: 差距：中國EMC報告不會自動證明辛巴威接受IEC 62920 / IEC 61000。出口商應將發射、諧波、閃爍、抗擾度、浪湧、接地、濾波器配置、電纜假設及電池耦合運行模式映射到提交給SAZ、ZERA、ZETDC、項目業主、保險方或融資方的準確逆變器配置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by SAZ conformity assessment, ZERA grid/distribution-code review, ZETDC connection approval, project procurement, insurer, lender, or site power-quality study; exact EMC test set is project- and configuration-specific.
mandatory_status.cn: Not directly equivalent — China GB EMC reports need edition, configuration, and acceptance mapping before use in Zimbabwe.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use China EMC reports only as supporting evidence. For Zimbabwe, map the inverter's EMC and power-quality file to IEC 62920 / IEC 61000, the actual 230/400 V 50 Hz installation, and any SAZ, ZERA, ZETDC, project-owner, insurer, or lender requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国EMC报告只能作为支持性证据。对于津巴布韦，应将逆变器EMC和电能质量文件映射至IEC 62920 / IEC 61000、实际230/400 V 50 Hz安装条件，以及任何SAZ、ZERA、ZETDC、项目业主、保险方或融资方要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國EMC報告只能作為支持性證據。對於辛巴威，應將逆變器EMC和電能品質文件映射至IEC 62920 / IEC 61000、實際230/400 V 50 Hz安裝條件，以及任何SAZ、ZERA、ZETDC、項目業主、保險方或融資方要求。
